---
title: "Airway RNA-seq: DESeq2 Differential Expression"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
```

## Setup

```{r load}
txi <- readRDS("../results/txi_gene.rds")

# coldata: SRR | condition | cell_line
coldata <- read.table("../metadata/samples.txt", header = FALSE,
                      col.names = c("srr", "condition", "cell_line"))
rownames(coldata) <- coldata$srr
coldata$condition <- factor(coldata$condition, levels = c("untreated", "dexamethasone"))
coldata$cell_line <- factor(coldata$cell_line)

# Align sample order
coldata <- coldata[colnames(txi$counts), ]
```

```{r deseq2}
# Paired design: block by cell_line, test condition
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromTximport(txi, colData = coldata, design = ~ cell_line + condition)
dds <- dds[rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) >= 3, ]   # pre-filter low-count genes
dds <- DESeq(dds)

message(sprintf("%d genes after filtering", nrow(dds)))
```

## PCA

```{r pca}
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
pca <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = c("condition", "cell_line"), returnData = TRUE)
pct <- round(100 * attr(pca, "percentVar"))

ggplot(pca, aes(PC1, PC2, colour = condition, shape = cell_line, label = name)) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_text_repel(size = 3) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(untreated = "steelblue", albuterol = "tomato")) +
    labs(x = paste0("PC1: ", pct[1], "% variance"),
         y = paste0("PC2: ", pct[2], "% variance"),
         title = "PCA — VST-normalised counts") +
    theme_bw()
```

## Differential Expression: dexamethasone vs untreated

```{r results}
res <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "dexamethasone", "untreated"),
               alpha = 0.05)
summary(res)

res_df <- as.data.frame(res) |>
    tibble::rownames_to_column("gene_id") |>
    filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
    mutate(sig = case_when(
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange >  1 ~ "up",
        padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -1 ~ "down",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
    ))

sym <- AnnotationDbi::mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys      = sub("\\..*", "", res_df$gene_id),
    column    = "SYMBOL",
    keytype   = "ENSEMBL",
    multiVals = "first")
res_df$gene_name <- ifelse(is.na(sym), res_df$gene_id, sym)
```

## Volcano Plot

```{r volcano}
top_labels <- res_df |>
    filter(sig != "ns") |>
    slice_min(padj, n = 20)

ggplot(res_df, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj), colour = sig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_labels, aes(label = gene_name), size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 20) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(up = "tomato", down = "steelblue", ns = "grey70")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(title = "Dexamethasone vs Untreated",
         x = "log2 fold change", y = "-log10 adjusted p-value") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.title = element_blank())
```

## Top DE Genes

```{r top-table}
res_df |>
    filter(sig != "ns") |>
    arrange(padj) |>
    head(20) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) round(x, 4))) |>
    dplyr::select(gene_name, gene_id, everything()) |>
    knitr::kable()
```
